title: Chapter 183, Section 1 — Acts Or Ceremonies Necessary For Conveyance
text: A deed executed and delivered by the person, or by the attorney of the person, having authority therefor, shall, subject to the limitations of section four, be sufficient, without any other act or ceremony, to convey land.
part_name: Real And Personal Property And Domestic Relations
catch_line: Acts Or Ceremonies Necessary For Conveyance
